title: Compras / Mercado
description: Preguntar precios, comprar y pedir productos.

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: How long does it take?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L20-02 - E1202 - Mia - How long does it take.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: How old is he?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L23-04 - E1234 - Noah - How old is he.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I can buy some rice.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L29-06 - E1296 - Ethan - I can buy some rice.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: The black one, please. How much is it?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L44-06 - E1446 - Ethan - The black one, please. How much is it.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: How much are the tickets?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L45-05 - E1455 - Ethan - How much are the tickets.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: They are eight dollars each.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L45-06 - E1456 - Mia - They are eight dollars each.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: How old are you now?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L46-03 - E1463 - Noah - How old are you now.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: How long have you lived here?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L02-03 - E2023 - Mia - How long have you lived here.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: How long have you studied English?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L09-01 - E2091 - Mia - How long have you studied English.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: How long have you lived here?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L09-03 - E2093 - Ethan - How long have you lived here.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: We need to buy Emma a gift.
items.translation: Necesitamos comprarle un regalo a Emma.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L16-01 - E2161 - Mia - We need to buy Emma a gift.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: What should we get her?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L16-02 - E2162 - Noah - What should we get her.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: And how many eggs?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L21-03 - E2213 - Emma - And how many eggs.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: We need volunteers to sell tickets.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L28-05 - E2285 - Emma - We need volunteers to sell tickets.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: How much are you going to save?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L43-02 - E2432 - Mia - How much are you going to save.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Yes, I want to buy a better camera.
items.translation: Sí, quiero comprar una cámara mejor.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L43-05 - E2435 - Ethan - Yes, I want to buy a better camera.mp3

items.speaker: Clerk
items.text: How much would you like to deposit?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L44-03 - E2443 - Clerk - How much would you like to deposit.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: If I had enough money, I'd travel around Europe.
items.translation: Si tuviera suficiente dinero, viajaría por Europa.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L46-04 - E2464 - Emma - If I had enough money, I'd travel around Europe.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: How many students may participate?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L47-04 - E2474 - Noah - How many students may participate.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: How late are you?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L10-02 - BR1102 - Nora - How late are you.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: There's a new food market downtown.
items.translation: Hay un mercado de comida nuevo en el centro.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L13-03 - BR1133 - Ben - There's a new food market downtown.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: No, but we'll get our money back.
items.translation: No, pero nos devolverán el dinero.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L17-04 - BR1174 - Nora - No, but we'll get our money back.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: Did you compare the prices?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L29-05 - BR1295 - Nora - Did you compare the prices.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Yes, and I ended up saving money.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L29-06 - BR1296 - Leo - Yes, and I ended up saving money.mp3
